title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers provide a step-by-step cleanup checklist for developers who continue to incur charges after deleting AWS resources. The video covers hidden charges from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms to prevent surprise charges.
